title: oenothera brevipes var. scapoidea
intro: Oenothera brevipes var. scapoidea, also known as a variety of evening primrose, is a plant species within the Onagraceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Oenothera brevipes var. scapoidea include its ability to soothe and calm the skin, reducing inflammation and promoting healing, as well as its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps and other symptoms associated with PMS. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and salves, although its use is not extensively documented and further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
